# User Betting Preferences

## What user WANTS
- Deep statistical analysis across ALL leagues, not just top
- Markets hierarchy: corners > cards > shots > fouls > goals (LAST)
- Less popular leagues = better value
- Pattern-based: extreme statistical profiles
- Multi-sport: football tennis basketball hockey baseball volleyball
- 5 coupons preferred output

## What user does NOT want
- Generic O2.5 goals from Forebet only
- Popular matches everyone bets on
- Lazy single-source analysis

## Workflow
- Agent gives min odds, user checks Betclic app, reports back
- Bankroll 32 PLN, daily 4-8 PLN, max single 2.00 PLN
